successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface and LeaveRepository class implementing it
src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveBalanceRepository interface and LeaveBalanceRepository class implementing it
src/modules/policy/policy.repository.ts exists and exports ILeavePolicyRepository interface and LeavePolicyRepository class implementing it
src/modules/notification/notification.repository.ts exists and exports INotificationRepository interface and NotificationRepository class implementing it
All repository methods use PostgreSQL pg client with proper connection management (acquire/release)
All repository methods include Vitest unit tests in tests/unit/modules/ with at least 80% code coverage
Repository update operations (updateStatus, updateBalance, markAsRead) execute atomically within a single database transaction
All repository methods properly map database column names to TypeScript interface property names (snake_case to camelCase)

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Use PostgreSQL pg client with connection pooling
Implement exact interfaces from per-phase architecture: ILeaveRepository, ILeaveBalanceRepository, ILeavePolicyRepository, INotificationRepository
Use exact dependencies from canonical list: Pool, LeaveRequest, CreateLeaveRequestDto, LeaveBalance, LeavePolicy, Notification
All repository methods must include proper error handling and connection management
Unit tests must be written using Vitest (not Jest as mentioned in intent)
outOfScope: Audit record creation (this is repository layer only)
RBAC enforcement (this is repository layer only)
Employee module repository (not mentioned in intent)
Any changes to existing domain models

ambiguities.description: Intent mentions 'Jest unit tests' but project uses Vitest per architecture
options: Use Vitest as per project architecture
Use Jest as mentioned in intent

ambiguities.description: Intent doesn't specify whether repository constructors should accept Pool instance or connection configuration
options: Accept connection config and create Pool internally
